name: librtlsdr0
title: librtlsdr0
summary: Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (library)
description:
Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (library)
rtl-sdr is a software defined radio (SDR) receiver software for certain
low-cost DVB-T/DAB(+) USB dongles based on the Realtek RTL2832U chip.
.
This package contains the shared library.
